Estonian Defence League (paramilitary) - funding rising from EUR 240m (2025-2028) to over EUR 314m (2026-2029)

CV90 infantry fighting vehicles (Scouts Battalion, due for replacement)

IRIS-T medium-range air defence system (jointly procured with Latvia)
procurement.value: Part of EUR 1.27 billion 2026 procurement total

procurement.item: U.S. Army launches $95 million biotech accelerator
UK startup tests new long-range strike missile
Estonia gets IRIS-T SLM air defense system that proved itself in Ukraine
German AI startup powers military drones without GPS

news: Estonia signed a follow-on agreement with Hanwha Aerospace (South Korea) for three additional K239 Chunmoo multiple rocket launchers, building on cooperation that also covers ammunition production and maintenance infrastructure in Estonia (2026-05-11).

In 2026 Estonia will receive its first IRIS-T medium-range air defence systems, jointly procured with Latvia from Diehl Defence, adding a new air defence layer with a range of roughly 40km and altitude coverage up to 20km (2026-02-12).
Estonia's K9 self-propelled howitzer fleet is being expanded to 36 units, alongside continued Caesar and HIMARS deployments and ongoing ammunition procurement (2026-02-13).
Canadian startup built silent electric motorcycle for soldiers (2026-06-16).
U.S. Army launches $95 million biotech accelerator (2026-06-19).
UK startup tests new long-range strike missile (2026-06-20).
Estonia gets IRIS-T SLM air defense system that proved itself in Ukraine (2026-06-23).
German AI startup powers military drones without GPS (2026-06-24).

upcoming_major_purchase.item: IRIS-T medium-range air defence system + 3x additional K239 Chunmoo MLRS
upcoming_major_purchase.quantity: 3 additional Chunmoo launchers (follow-on order); IRIS-T system quantity not disclosed, jointly procured with Latvia
upcoming_major_purchase.value: Part of EUR 1.27 billion 2026 procurement allocation
upcoming_major_purchase.notes: 2026-2029 defence plan allocates 37% of the budget to procurement and 25% to ammunition, with major investments also planned in drones, an artillery regiment, and naval modernisation.

nato_presence.notes: Battlegroup hosted at Tapa; troop numbers fluctuate with rotations.
